## Project: Ubiquitous
**Repository:** https://github.com/APrettyCoolProgram/ubiquitous  
**Branch:** development  
**Target Framework:** .NET 10

## Task: Implement Basic TextGames UI

### Overview
Implemented the Basic TextGames user interface type with simplified black and white theme.

### Changes Made

#### 1. MainWindow.xaml
- **Updated UI Layout:**
  - Removed Inventory Panel (right panel)
  - Changed from 2-column to single-column layout
  - Updated color scheme to black and white theme
  - Maintained Game Output Area, Command History, and Command Input components

- **Styling Updates:**
  - Background: White
  - Text colors: Black
  - Border colors: Black with 2px thickness
  - Font: Consolas (monospace) maintained across all text elements
  - Simplified modern dark theme to classic black and white

- **Component Configuration:**
  - Game Output Area: Full-width, scrollable, white background with black text
  - Command History: 100px height, scrollable, displays recent commands
  - Command Input: Text box with ">" prompt, SEND button with black background

#### 2. MainWindow.xaml.cs
- **Removed Features:**
  - Removed `UpdateInventoryDisplay()` method
  - Removed inventory-related UI updates from `ProcessCommand()`
  - Removed inventory list binding logic

- **Maintained Features:**
  - Command history navigation (Up/Down arrow keys)
  - Command processing and game integration
  - Auto-scroll functionality for game output
  - Enter key and SEND button support
  - Game initialization with sample adventure

#### 3. File Management
- Created backup: `MainWindow.xaml.fancy.bak` (preserves Fancy UI implementation)
- Removed temporary file: `MainWindow_Basic.xaml`

### Technical Details

**UI Component Specifications:**
- Window size: 800x600 pixels
- Game Output Area: Dynamically sized, takes remaining vertical space
- Command History: Fixed 100px height
- Command Input: Auto-sized based on content
- All panels use 2px black borders
- 10px margin around main grid

**Functionality Preserved:**
- Command input and processing
- Command history with arrow key navigation
- Game output with auto-scroll
- Quit/Exit commands to close application
- Focus management for command input

### Build Status
? Build successful  
? No compilation errors  
? Basic UI implementation complete

---

## Notes
- The Fancy UI implementation has been backed up and can be restored if needed
- Both UI types share the same underlying game engine and command processing logic
- The Basic UI focuses on essential gameplay elements without status or inventory panels
- Black and white theme provides a classic text adventure aesthetic
